description: An alumnus needs to send an official transcript to a potential employer.

nodes.task_description: Verify the identity of the alumnus using their student ID and other personal information.
Collect the recipient's information (e.g., employer's email address) and explain any associated fees.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gathers all necessary details for the transcript order.

nodes.task_description: Process the official transcript request through the university's secure portal.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully submits the request for electronic delivery.
